inputs.label: Decimal Number
inputs.businessContext: The non-negative decimal integer to convert to binary.

businessContext_i18n.en: The non-negative decimal integer to convert to binary.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İkiliye dönüştürülecek negatif olmayan ondalık tam sayı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die nicht-negative ganze Dezimalzahl, die in Binär umgewandelt werden soll.

inputs.label: Minimum Bits
inputs.businessContext: Minimum number of bits in the output binary string. Shorter results are padded with leading zeros.

businessContext_i18n.en: Minimum number of bits in the output binary string. Shorter results are padded with leading zeros.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İkili çıktı dizisindeki minimum bit sayısı. Kısa sonuçlar başa sıfır eklenerek doldurulur.
businessContext_i18n.de: Mindestanzahl von Bits in der ausgegebenen Binärzeichenfolge. Kürzere Ergebnisse werden mit führenden Nullen aufgefüllt.

inputs.label: Group Size
inputs.businessContext: Number of bits per group separated by a space. 0 means no grouping.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of bits per group separated by a space. 0 means no grouping.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Boşlukla ayrılmış grup başına bit sayısı. 0 gruplama yapılmaz.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Bits pro Gruppe, getrennt durch ein Leerzeichen. 0 bedeutet keine Gruppierung.

inputs.label: Include 0b Prefix
inputs.businessContext: 1 to prepend '0b' prefix, 0 to omit. Only effective when output is a string.

businessContext_i18n.en: 1 to prepend '0b' prefix, 0 to omit. Only effective when output is a string.
businessContext_i18n.tr: 1 ise '0b' önekini ekle, 0 ise atla. Yalnızca çıktı dize olduğunda etkilidir.
businessContext_i18n.de: 1, um das Präfix '0b' voranzustellen, 0, um es wegzulassen. Nur wirksam, wenn die Ausgabe eine Zeichenfolge ist.

inputs.label: Output as Number
inputs.businessContext: 1 to output the binary value as a base-10 number (loosing leading zeros and formatting), 0 to output as a formatted string.

businessContext_i18n.en: 1 to output the binary value as a base-10 number (loosing leading zeros and formatting), 0 to output as a formatted string.
businessContext_i18n.tr: 1 ise ikili değeri ondalık sayı olarak çıkar (baştaki sıfırlar ve biçimlendirme kaybolur), 0 ise biçimlendirilmiş dize olarak çıkar.
businessContext_i18n.de: 1 um den Binärwert als Dezimalzahl auszugeben (führende Nullen und Formatierung verlieren), 0 um als formatierte Zeichenfolge auszugeben.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
